creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253064
Patch for libngtcp2

* Switch to CMake for faster builds and removes the need for custom non upstreamed patches

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)

"Mini" exp-run on using Poudriere (14.1-RELEASE) looks fine
